title: Infertility hormone result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.
assessment.rationale: The exact WHO diagnostic pathway supports recording result source and date, fertility-related symptom context and clinician-reviewed endocrine laboratory results without diagnosing a cause of infertility.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility
source.population: Individuals and couples being evaluated and managed for infertility.
source.setting: Primary, reproductive-health, fertility, and specialist services adaptable to national settings.
source.exclusions: Exact global guidance for infertility history, focused examination, diagnostic evaluation, and person-centred support; requires UAE adaptation and does not directly cover recurrent pregnancy loss as a separate presentation.

exact_location.heading: Chapter 5.1–5.3 — female, male, and unexplained infertility diagnostic pathways

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines female, male, and unexplained-factor evaluation, menstrual-pattern context, ovulation confirmation, reproductive hormones, semen analysis, tubal assessment, and uterine-cavity assessment.

assessment.text: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.
assessment.rationale: The exact person-centred section supports patient concerns, questions, clinician-entered plan and arranged follow-up only when discussed; it does not interpret a hormone result or select treatment.
